_meta.description: Amazon keyword templates and openers for elite listing generation
_meta.usage: Loaded by SEO Agent in Phase 3 keyword synthesis

description_section_guidance.Product Features: 3-4 sentences. Key features. Tier-2 keywords woven in.
description_section_guidance.Product Benefits: 4-5 sentences. LONGEST section. Features to outcomes. Counter 3 pain points. Tier-3 keyword.
description_section_guidance.Use Instructions: 2-3 sentences. Clear directions. One pro tip.

keyword_tiers.tier_1: Primary — highest volume — use in title and first bullet
keyword_tiers.tier_2: Secondary — feature-based — use in bullets 2-4 and description features
keyword_tiers.tier_3: LSI/Long-tail — intent-based — use in description benefits and backend

planning_steps: Select 5 ALL-CAPS keyword openers from bullet_openers list
Map each competitor pain point to exactly one bullet
Count characters precisely before writing each section
Place Tier-1 keyword in title first 80 chars
Track running description char count across sections
